recent_projects.name: stravinsky
recent_projects.summary: MCP Bridge for Claude Code with Multi-Model Support. Install globally: claude mcp add --scope user stravinsky -- uvx stravinsky. Add to CLAUDE.md: See https://pypi.org/project/stravinsky/
recent_projects.author: Stravinsky Team
